who: field service dispatchers in home services processing 10–20 work orders/week
offer: For field service dispatchers in home services processing 10–20 work orders/week, inefficient communication causes late updates to clients. We automatically generate work order completion summaries instead of manual summary creation.
problem: Inefficient communication of work order completions
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for field service dispatchers
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to dispatchers with demo video
Community forums for sharing tools and tips
try_it: Let users try template-based summary generation on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as templates for reuse
Set default reminder schedules for tasks
Allow CSV import for existing data
Enable one-click export of simple reports
Streamline onboarding process for new users
